critique_summary: External critique (2026-04-20): RaftReachable.step bundles 5 hypotheses as abstract axioms. ~60-70% of components exist. Election model (NodeState, terms, votedFor, leader completeness composition) is the critical missing piece. ~3-5 new Lean files, ~100-200 new theorems needed.

targets.notes: RT0+RT1+RT2 proved (0 sorry). CONDITIONAL: step hypotheses are abstract axioms, not discharged from concrete election model.
NEW TARGET (r149): Model NodeState (currentTerm, votedFor, role), vote-granting rules, term monotonicity. Foundation for all other gap targets.
NEW TARGET (r149): Prove at most one leader per term (ElectionSafety). Uses HQ20 + TallyVotes.
NEW TARGET (r149): HARDEST GAP. Compose HQ20 + IU16 + RSS5 to prove elected leader has all committed entries. Discharges hqc_preserved.
NEW TARGET (r149): AppendEntries + RequestVote with terms. Discharge hlogs', hno_overwrite, hcommitted_mono.
NEW TARGET (r149): Discharge hnew_cert — commit only after quorum ACK. Builds on CMC3.

ci_status: Healthy. Lean 4.28.0. No lake update needed (stdlib only).

lean_stdlib_notes.no_lemma_keyword: In Lean 4.28 stdlib-only, 'lemma' is not a top-level keyword. Use 'theorem' or 'private theorem' instead.
lean_stdlib_notes.private_theorem: Use 'private theorem' for module-internal helpers (not 'private lemma').
lean_stdlib_notes.no_split_ifs: split_ifs is Mathlib only. Use by_cases h : P <;> simp [h].
lean_stdlib_notes.no_push_neg: push_neg is Mathlib only. Use omega or Nat.lt_of_not_le.
lean_stdlib_notes.no_le_rfl: le_rfl does not exist. Use Nat.le_refl _.
lean_stdlib_notes.beq_iff_eq: beq_iff_eq : a == b ↔ a = b — stdlib for LawfulBEq.
lean_stdlib_notes.induction_implicit_vars: In 'induction h with | step ... =>', implicit vars get ✝-named. Use 'rename_i cs_prev cs_new' to name them.
lean_stdlib_notes.strong_induction: induction n using Nat.strongRecOn with | ind n ih => ...

findings: SOUNDNESS: Prior RSS3/RSS4 were false as stated (no hypotheses = arbitrary logs). Fixed r130 with LogMatchingInvariantFor/NoRollbackInvariantFor.
No bugs found in implementation code.
GAP (r149): RaftReachable.step has 5 abstract hypotheses never discharged from concrete election model. Project is ~60-70% complete, not COMPLETE.
HARDEST GAP: hqc_preserved (leader completeness) requires election model + composition of HQ20 + IU16 + TallyVotes + RSS5.
next_targets: A2: election_safety — at most one leader per term (HQ20 + TallyVotes)
